title: #claude Chat vs. Cowork: Biggest 3 differences
summary: Claude Cowork is a desktop-based Claude interface that removes file upload limits, supports larger context windows, and delivers output files directly to the user's folder. It contrasts with Claude Chat by reading from local storage rather than uploading to the cloud, eliminating the 20-file and 30MB-per-file restrictions.
